message:
fix(transport): prevent unbounded waker queue growth with tracked waiters

Introduces ChannelWaiter and MockWaiter structs that pair each waker
with an AtomicBool flag to track whether the waiter is still queued.
This prevents unbounded memory growth in long-running async scenarios
where tasks repeatedly poll without being ready.

Key changes:
- Add ChannelWaiter struct in mod.rs with waker + queued flag
- Add MockWaiter struct in mock.rs with same pattern
- Track waiter state in MockSymbolSink and MockSymbolStream
- Track waiter state in ChannelSink and ChannelStream
- Only register new waiters when not already queued or when previously
  woken (flag cleared)
- Clear queued flag before waking to signal waiter removal
- Properly drop locks before waking to avoid deadlocks

The pattern ensures each task has at most one entry in the waker queue
at any time, regardless of how many times it polls while pending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
